content.text:
{
  "dimension": "anti-pattern-avoidance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach avoided every priority AoA anti-pattern and specifically declined the baits this scenario sets. When the client explicitly asks for a verdict (Turn 3), the coach refuses to fix or adjudicate — sidestepping fixing-people and view-as-technique. The coach does not jump to compassion or partner-empathy before the want is felt (avoiding dont-jump-to-compassion-before-anger), does not skip to the 'deeper want is generous' frame prematurely (avoiding spiritual-narcissism), and does not fight the inner critic but instead names it and invites the client to let it be the mother's, not theirs (Turn 12) — the un-trap move on dont-fight-the-voice. Question density stays low and connective rather than extractive (avoiding wonder-as-strategy), and there is no AoA jargon evangelism. The warmth is present alongside the precision, so view-as-technique does not trip. No loving-to-transform escalation; the coach matches the client's pace rather than pushing.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Opens with the want, not a verdict — declines the 'am I selfish' frame."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Explicitly refuses the bait to adjudicate; surfaces the futility of an external yes."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Invites somatic contact with the wanting itself — avoids spiritual-narcissism by letting the surface want be felt."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Stays with the fear rather than rushing to reassure or pivot to partner-empathy."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Catches the walk-back without arguing the critic; un-trap move."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the inherited voice and invites the client to let it be the mother's — includes rather than fights the inner critic."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["state-the-want-not-the-action", "find-the-want-behind-the-should", "the-want", "what-if-you-acted-exactly-how-you-want", "childhood-imprinting", "linguistic-caveat"],
  "expected_territory_misses": [],
  "notes": "Strong positive avoidance: client actively baited fixing-people/view-as-technique in Turn 3 and the coach declined gracefully."
}
